evidence: "This is the best of the Star Trek from an arc and storytelling perspective."

"This episode did have a few well done 'quiet moments' that helped offset the frantic ticking of plot resolution boxes that filled the rest of the show."
"This is not at all what it is. It has humor, but it's an emotionally wrenching and very beautiful story..."
"I also thought the regeneration ending was dragged out a little too long..."
"Superb writing with a few clunkers here and there."
"Great acting. Both lead characters are flawed."

"Pixar is almost always exceptional, and this is one of those times."
"The whole course focuses on the Gothic Cathedral more than others..."
"It has humor, but it's an emotionally wrenching and very beautiful story..."
"This is a classic. I just love it."

summary: The user has a strong preference for sci-fi and drama genres, particularly enjoying series like Star Trek and Doctor Who. They appreciate high production quality and emotional depth in storytelling, often favoring character-driven narratives over purely plot-driven ones.
